chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 457 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution. -------------- 11.02.2025. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Matter is pending in non-prosecution since 2022. Accordingly this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
